name: Creator Studio 16
shortSummary: Large-screen creative workstation for video, 3D, and design work.
longDescription:
Creator Studio 16 is built for photographers, video editors, and designers who need color accuracy, GPU acceleration, and plenty of RAM. The 16-inch panel and dedicated graphics make timeline scrubbing and viewport previews noticeably smoother than on typical ultrabooks.

Specifications:
- CPU: 12-core high-performance mobile processor
- RAM: 64 GB
- Storage: 2 TB SSD
- GPU: Discrete GPU with 8 GB VRAM
- Display: 16-inch IPS, 2560x1600, factory-calibrated wide color gamut
- Battery life: up to 6 hours under mixed use
- Weight: 2.4 kg

This model excels at multi-layer video edits, 3D scene work, and large design files in tools such as image editors, NLEs, and 3D suites. Extra memory keeps large assets in RAM and reduces swapping when several creative apps run at once.

The larger display improves timeline and layer visibility, and the calibrated screen is helpful when judging color for delivery. The cooling system is tuned for sustained loads during rendering or exports.

Trade-offs include higher weight and shorter battery life than 14-inch productivity laptops. It is not aimed at silent, fanless operation or maximum portability.

Creator Studio 16 is best for creative professionals who need GPU power and screen size on the go and can accept a heavier chassis.
